Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: accessories by location above the waist [300211602], worn costume accessories [300209274], costume accessories [300209273], costume (mode of fashion) [300178802], Costume (hierarchy name) [300209261], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Stiff panels, usually triangular in shape and often heavily decorated, inserted in an open bodice to cover the corset.

Source.Source_ID: 2000001681/Livandi, Thesaurus of Clothing and Textile Terms, Personal Artifacts (1990)

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Paneles almidonados, generalmente de forma triangular y con frecuencia muy decorados, insertos en un cuerpo abierto para cubrir el corsé.
Stijve panelen die meestal driehoekig van vorm en vaak uitbundig versierd zijn en in een open lijfje geplaatst worden om het korset te bedekken.
Steife Stoffbahn, in der Regel dreieckig und oft stark verziert, die in ein offenes Mieder eingesteckt wird, um das Korsett zu bedecken.

Source.Source_ID: 2000001681/Livandi, Thesaurus of Clothing and Textile Terms, Personal Artifacts (1990)
2000007861/Cunnington et al., Dictionary of English Costume (1965)

Term_Source.Page: illustration, Vol. 2, "Vocabulary of Basic Terms for Cataloguing Costume" - ICOM International Committee.

Source.Source_ID: 2000030201/National Museum of American History, Dictionary of Costume (n.d.)
